info.title: IT Top Journal API
info.description: Auto-generated documentation from daily Journal API collection.

servers.description: Official API server (requires valid Bearer token)

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from POST /auth/login response field `access_token`. Pass as: Authorization: Bearer <token>

requestBody.description: Content-Type: application/json must be set explicitly.

parameters.name: Origin
parameters.description: Required by the API CORS policy.

parameters.name: Referer
parameters.description: Required by the API. Must end with trailing slash.

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.example: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/142.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
parameters.description: Recommended to match a real browser UA to avoid blocks.
